name: ULIP maturity taxability — premium > 2.5L
description: User has ULIP with premium > 2.5L bought after Feb 2021 — maturity is taxable

input.message: I have a ULIP where I pay ₹3 lakhs annually. I bought it in March 2022. Will my maturity amount be tax-free under 10(10D)?

notes: Finance Act 2021: ULIPs purchased after Feb 1, 2021 with annual premium > ₹2.5L are NOT exempt under 10(10D). Gains taxable at 10% LTCG. User's ₹3L > ₹2.5L threshold. Maturity gains are taxable. This is a critical tax point — must be accurate.
